question: Say whether each of the boldface numbers in this exercise is a parameter or a statistic. There were $\mathbf{1 8 , 8 0 0}$ new cases of female breast cancer in the state of California in 2005. A study of 1225 of these cases finds that survival varied greatly by stage of diagnosis. The average 7 -year survival rate for stage I breast cancer was $\mathbf{9 2}  oldsymbol{\%}$. For stage II breast cancer, the 7 -year survival was $71 \%$. For stage III breast cancer, the survival was $39 \%$. For stage IV, the survival rate was $11 \%$.
answer: 18,800 is a parameter. All the other numbers are statistics.
